system_prompt: You are an OpenFOAM debugging planner. Given current foam files, error logs and reviewer analysis, create a minimal rewrite plan. Output MUST be strict JSON only, with this exact schema: {"target_files": [{"file": "relative/path", "changes": "change1; change2"}]}. Rules: 1) Do not use markdown, backticks, or comments. 2) Use double quotes for all strings. 3) In changes, use short plain text actions separated by semicolons. 4) Do not include parentheses, backticks, or quote characters inside changes text. 5) Do not include run steps; only file edits.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      controlDict;
}

application     rhoSimpleFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         500;

deltaT          1;

writeControl    timeStep;

writeInterval   100;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='decomposeParDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      decomposeParDict;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

numberOfSubdomains  4;

method          scotch;

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvConstraints', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvConstraints;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //


// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         steadyState;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
    grad(U)         cellLimited Gauss linear 1;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      bounded Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div(phi,e)      bounded Gauss linearUpwind default;
    div(phi,h)      bounded Gauss linearUpwind default;
    div(phi,K)      bounded Gauss linearUpwind default;
    div(phi,k)      bounded Gauss linearUpwind default;
    div(phi,epsilon) bounded Gauss linearUpwind default;
    div(phi,Ekp)    bounded Gauss linearUpwind default;
    div(((rho*nuEff)*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

wallDist
{
    method          meshWave;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    p
    {
        solver          GAMG;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.1;
    }

    "(U|h|e|k|epsilon|omega)"
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.1;
    }
}

SIMPLE
{
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
    pMinFactor      0.1;
    pMaxFactor      1.5;

    residualControl
    {
        p               1e-4;
        U               1e-4;
        "(h|e)"         1e-4;
        k               1e-4;
        epsilon         1e-4;
    }
}

relaxationFactors
{
    fields
    {
        p               0.3;
        rho             0.01;
    }
    equations
    {
        U               0.7;
        "(h|e)"         0.7;
        k               0.7;
        epsilon         0.7;
    }
}

mixture

    transport

internalField   uniform 300;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 1500;
    }

    outlet

        type            inletOutlet;
        inletValue      uniform 300;
        value           uniform 300;
    }

    innerWall
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    outerWall
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    lowerWall
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    upperWall
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   1;

vertices
(
    // Block 0 - inlet section (straight duct along x-axis)
    // Vertices 0-3
    (-50  25  25)   // 0
    (-50  25 -25)   // 1
    (-50 -25 -25)   // 2
    (-50 -25  25)   // 3

    (  0  25  25)   // 4
    (  0  25 -25)   // 5
    (  0 -25 -25)   // 6
    (  0 -25  25)   // 7

    // Block 1 - bend section
    // Vertices 8-11
    ( 25   0  25)   // 8
    ( 25   0 -25)   // 9
    ( 25 -50 -25)   // 10
    ( 25 -50  25)   // 11

    // Block 2 - post-bend straight section
    // Vertices 12-15
    ( 25  -75  25)   // 12
    ( 25  -75 -25)   // 13
    ( 25 -125 -25)   // 14
    ( 25 -125  25)   // 15

    // Block 3 - extended outlet duct
    // Vertices 16-19
    (-500  -75  25)   // 16
    (-500  -75 -25)   // 17
    (-500 -125 -25)   // 18
    (-500 -125  25)   // 19
);

blocks
(
    // Block 0: Inlet straight section
    hex (3 2 1 0 7 6 5 4) (10 10 10) simpleGrading (1 1 1)

    // Block 1: Bend section
    hex (7 6 5 4 11 10 9 8) (10 10 10) simpleGrading (1 1 1)

    // Block 2: Post-bend straight section
    hex (8 7 6 5 12 11 10 9) (10 10 10) simpleGrading (1 1 1)

    // Block 3: Extended outlet duct
    // Reordered to fix inward-pointing face error
    hex (10 11 12 13 19 18 17 16) (40 10 10) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);

edges
(
);

boundary
(
    inlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (0 1 2 3)
        );
    }

    outlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (16 17 18 19)
        );
    }

    walls
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            // Block 0 walls
            (3 2 1 0)    // x=-50 face
            (7 6 5 4)    // x=0 face
            (1 5 4 0)    // y=25 face
            (2 6 7 3)    // y=-25 face
            (3 7 4 0)    // z=25 face
            (1 2 6 5)    // z=-25 face

            // Block 1 walls
            // x=0 face already covered by Block 0 (face 7 6 5 4)
            // x=25 face (11 10 9 8)
            (11 10 9 8)  // x=25 face
            // y=25 face (4 5 6 7)
            (4 5 6 7)    // y=25 face
            // y=-50 face (10 11 8 9)
            (10 11 8 9)  // y=-50 face
            // z=25 face (0 4 7 3)
            (0 4 7 3)    // z=25 face
            // z=-25 face (1 2 10 9)
            (1 2 10 9)   // z=-25 face

            // Block 2 walls
            // x=0 face already covered by Block 1 (face 8 7 6 5)
            // x=25 face (12 13 14 15)
            (12 13 14 15) // x=25 face
            // y=-25 face (5 6 11 12)
            (5 6 11 12)   // y=-25 face
            // y=-125 face (9 10 14 15)
            (9 10 14 15)  // y=-125 face
            // z=25 face (5 8 12 15)
            (5 8 12 15)   // z=25 face
            // z=-25 face (9 13 14 10)
            (9 13 14 10)  // z=-25 face

            // Block 3 walls
            // x=0 face (19 16 11 13)
            (19 16 11 13) // x=0 face
            // x=-500 face (10 19 18 17)
            (10 19 18 17) // x=-500 face
            // y=-75 face (16 17 10 19)
            (16 17 10 19) // y=-75 face
            // y=-125 face (18 19 15 14)
            (18 19 15 14) // y=-125 face
            // z=25 face (19 16 12 15)
            (19 16 12 15) // z=25 face
            // z=-25 face (17 18 14 13)
            (17 18 14 13) // z=-25 face
        );
    }
);

mergePatchPairs
(
);

<review_analysis># Error Analysis and Resolution

## Error 1: `log.blockMesh` — Block hex (10 11 12 13 19 18 17 16) has inward-pointing faces

The error is:
```
Block hex (10 11 12 13 19 18 17 16) ... has inward-pointing faces
    4(10 13 12 11)
```

This means the face `(10 13 12 11)` on the x=25 side of Block 3 is wound incorrectly — the normal points **into** the block instead of outward.

Let me trace the vertices:
- 10: (25, -125, -25)
- 11: (25, -125, 25)
- 12: (25, -75, 25)
- 13: (25, -75, -25)

All at x=25. Face `(10 13 12 11)` goes: (-25) → (-25) → (25) → (25) in z-direction. Viewed from outside (positive x), this is clockwise → wrong winding.

To fix this, reverse the winding of the face. The corrected hex should be:

```
hex (10 13 12 11 19 16 17 18) (40 10 10) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
```

Where:
- Back face: `(10 13 12 11)` — now winds CCW when viewed from outside (+x): 10(-25)→13(-25)→12(25)→11(25) = CCW ✓
- Front face: `(19 16 17 18)` at x=-500

Update the boundary face definitions for Block 3 walls to match this new block topology.

## Error 2: `log.rhoSimpleFoam` — Cannot find "points"

This is a cascading error from `blockMesh` failing. It will resolve automatically once `blockMesh` succeeds.

## Summary of Changes

1. **`blockMeshDict`**: Change Block 3 from `hex (10 11 12 13 19 18 17 16)` to `hex (10 13 12 11 19 16 17 18)` to fix the inward-pointing face error.
2. **Boundary faces for Block 3 walls**: Update the six wall faces of Block 3 to match the corrected block vertex ordering. Specifically, the faces involving vertices 10, 11, 12, 13, 16, 17, 18, 19 need to be redefined to correspond to the external faces of the newly ordered block.</review_analysis>
<user_requirement>Conduct a 3D squarebend flow simulation using OpenFOAM. The computational domain includes multiple regions, with vertices defined as inlet points at (-50, 25, 25) and (-50, 25, -25), outlet points at (-500, -75, 25) and (-500, -75, -25), and mid-bend points like (25, 0, 25) and (25, 0, -25). Follow the same geomtery as the tutorial. Use a start time of 0 seconds, an end time of 500 seconds, a time step of 1 second, and write results every 100 seconds. Use a massflow rate inlet of 0.5 with turbulentBL profile. Outlet is pressureInletOutletVelocity. Temperature has an inlet value of 1500. Pressure inlet has a value of 110000. use kepsilon turbulence model. Use rhoSimpleFoam solver. Use Pr value of 0.71.</user_requirement>
Return strict JSON now with key target_files only.
response: target_files=[PlannedFileChange(file='system/blockMeshDict', changes='Change Block 3 hex definition from hex (10 11 12 13 19 18 17 16) to hex (10 13 12 11 19 16 17 18) with same grading (40 10 10) simpleGrading (1 1 1); Update Block 3 wall faces: replace (10 11 12 13 19 18 17 16) block faces with ones matching the new vertex order where back face is (10 13 12 11) and front face is (19 16 17 18); Replace face (10 19 18 17) with (10 17 18 19); Replace face (16 17 10 19) with (16 19 17 18); Replace face (18 19 15 14) with (18 14 15 19); Replace face (19 16 12 15) with (19 15 12 16); Replace face (17 18 14 13) with (17 13 14 18)')]
